name: New Drip Campaign Email 3
body:
Hi %contact_first_name%,

I’m always interested in what has someone shopping for a home. Are
you moving to the %contact_city% area? Or maybe just looking for a
larger home?

I’ll try to send some info your way to make this process breezy for you.
Just let me know your goals. %custom_ylopo_listing_alert% are some you might like!


Best,
subject: Moving Here? New Job? Upgrading? Downsizing?
